basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Headmaster Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Headmaster Govt High School Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of Mizoram PSC. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced through the Mizoram PSC Headmaster Govt High School Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Trained Graduate High School Teachers and trained Graduate High School Hindi Teachers with not less than 8 years regular service in the grade.
qualification.details: Trained Graduate High School Teachers and trained Graduate High School Hindi Teachers with not less than 8 years regular service in the grade.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Headmaster Govt High School Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Headmaster Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Mizoram PSC Headmaster, Govt. High School posts is 12th June 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Headmaster post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies announced for the Headmaster, Govt. High School position by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Trained Graduate High School Teachers or trained Graduate High School Hindi Teachers with a minimum of 8 years of regular service in the grade to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Headmaster post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Headmaster, Govt. High School post will receive a salary as per Level 10 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The official notification states that the application fee for General/OBC candidates is not specified. Please refer to the detailed notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for PwBD candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Headmaster position?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Headmaster, Govt. High School post will be based on a Limited Departmental Examination.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Mizoram apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly mention restrictions for candidates outside Mizoram. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Mizoram PSC Headmaster Recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official Mizoram PSC website. Visit the 'Important Links' section for the direct application link.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can download it from there for detailed information.
